site.name: APL Trading
site.description: APL Trading - Your trusted B2B product sourcing and inquiry marketplace.

contact.address: 123 Industrial Way, Suite A, Commerce City, CA 90210

products.name: Industrial Diesel Generator 500kVA
products.description: High-capacity diesel generator suitable for backup power in industrial facilities. Features advanced cooling and noise reduction.

products.name: Wholesale Cotton Textiles (1000m Roll)
products.description: Premium 100% organic cotton rolls for apparel manufacturing. Width: 1.5m. Available in various base colors.

products.name: Galvanized Steel Pipes (12 inch)
products.description: High-durability galvanized steel pipes grade A106. Ideal for heavy construction and liquid transport. Corrosion resistant.

products.name: Enterprise Server Rack 42U
products.description: Standard 19-inch 42U server enclosure with perforated doors for optimal airway cooling and cable matching. Includes casters.

products.name: Heavy Duty Pallet Jack 3 Ton
products.description: Manual hydraulic pallet jack with pure polyurethane wheels. Load capacity of 3000kg. Essential warehouse equipment.

products.name: Bulk Corrugated Packaging Boxes
products.description: Standard double-wall corrugated shipping boxes. Dimensions: 12x12x12 inches. 100% recyclable material.

products.name: Industrial Safety Helmets (Class E)
products.description: High-impact resistant safety helmets certified Class E (Electrical). Adjustable suspension system for comfort.

products.name: High Precision CNC Milling Machine
products.description: 5-axis simultaneous CNC milling machine with automatic tool changer. Precision down to 0.001mm.

products.name: Ordinary Portland Cement OPC 53 Grade (50kg Bag)
products.description: High-strength OPC 53 Grade cement conforming to IS:12269. Ideal for RCC structures, bridges, and high-strength concrete. 50kg HDPE bags with moisture barrier.

products.name: TMT Steel Rebar Fe-500D (12mm, 12m Length)
products.description: Thermo-Mechanically Treated (TMT) reinforcement bars grade Fe-500D. Superior ductility, weldability, and seismic resistance. Certified to IS:1786.

products.name: Ready-Mix Concrete M30 Grade (Per Cubic Meter)
products.description: Plant-batched M30 Ready-Mix Concrete conforming to IS:4926. Designed for foundations, columns, and slabs. Available with admixtures for waterproofing and retardation.

products.name: Modular Steel Scaffolding System (Frame Set)
products.description: Complete frame scaffolding system with cross braces, platforms, and base plates. Load certified up to 500kg per bay. Hot-dip galvanized for durability.

products.name: AAC Autoclaved Aerated Concrete Blocks (600x200x200mm)
products.description: Lightweight AAC blocks with superior thermal insulation and fire resistance. Density: 600 kg/m³. Reduces structural load by 35% vs traditional bricks.

products.name: Bitumen Waterproofing Membrane (4mm APP Modified)
products.description: 4mm APP (Atactic Polypropylene) modified bitumen waterproofing membrane. Torch-applied. UV stable and puncture resistant. Suitable for flat roofs and basements.

products.name: Hydraulic Concrete Batching Plant 60 m³/hr
products.description: Fully automated twin-shaft concrete batching plant with 60m³/hour output. Includes cement silos, aggregate bins, conveyor belts, and PLC control system.

products.name: Anti-Corrosion Structural Steel I-Beam (HEB 200)
products.description: HEB 200 structural steel I-beams with anti-corrosion primer coat. Grade S355JR. Ideal for mezzanines, columns, and industrial frameworks. Cut to length on order.

products.name: 20mm Natural Granite Floor Tiles (60x60cm)
products.description: Premium grade natural granite floor tiles in 60x60cm format. Polished finish. Suitable for commercial lobbies, corridors, and high-traffic areas. Slip-resistant coating available.

products.name: Rock Wool Board Insulation 100mm (1000x600mm)
products.description: High-density rock wool (stone wool) insulation boards for walls, roofs, and industrial pipes. Non-combustible (A1 Euroclass). Thermal conductivity λ = 0.035 W/mK.
